title: japanobotrychum strictum
intro: Japanobotrychum strictum, also known as the Japanese resurrection fern, is a type of lycopodiophyte plant that grows in the mountainous regions of Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. The health benefits of Japanobotrychum strictum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and act as an antioxidant. Japanobotrychum strictum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its potential medicinal properties.
